researched_category.value: AI Video and Image Generation Platform
researched_category.notes: Higgsfield is an AI-native creative suite that provides access to 30+ models for generating images and videos, including Sora 2, Kling 3.0, Veo 3.1, Seedance 2.0, and more.

one_liner.value: AI-powered creative suite for generating and managing AI images and videos with 30+ models through a unified REST API, SDK, and MCP server
one_liner.notes: Platform provides access to over 100+ generative models for diverse creation needs through a single, unified integration point.

methods.notes: The REST API uses API key authentication (Authorization: Key {api_key}:{api_key_secret} header or Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key header). The hosted MCP server uses OAuth via Higgsfield account login. The CLI uses long-lived API tokens.

access.notes: Developers can sign up at cloud.higgsfield.ai for free, get API keys from the dashboard, and start using the API. Free tier provides limited credits (daily 5-10). Paid plans (Basic $9/mo, etc.) unlock more credits and features. No admin approval, phone verification, or sales contact required for basic API access. API is accessible on any plan including free.

summary.value: Comprehensive REST API documented at docs.higgsfield.ai. Base URL: https://platform.higgsfield.ai. Endpoints for submitting generation requests (POST /{model_id}), checking status (GET /requests/{request_id}/status), and canceling (POST /requests/{request_id}/cancel). Supports 100+ models across image, video, voice, and audio generation. Official Python SDK (pip install higgsfield-client) with sync and async support. Webhook integration available. The API uses an async request-response pattern with queuing.
summary.notes: Also available through third-party aggregators like MindCloud, VideoGenAPI, and Pixazo.

agent_interface.notes: Higgsfield launched an official hosted MCP server on April 30, 2026 at wss://mcp.higgsfield.ai/mcp. It exposes 30+ image and video generation models. Auth is OAuth via Higgsfield account (no API keys needed for MCP). Two community MCP servers also exist (geopopos/higgsfield_ai_mcp and jfikrat/higgsfield-mcp). The platform also offers a CLI tool and an official Python SDK. There is also a Make.com community integration.

rationale.value: Higgsfield is fully buildable as an agent toolkit today. It has a well-documented public REST API (docs.higgsfield.ai), an official hosted MCP server at wss://mcp.higgsfield.ai/mcp (launched April 2026), an official Python SDK (pip install higgsfield-client), webhook support, and a CLI tool. Authentication is straightforward using API keys obtained from a self-serve dashboard (cloud.higgsfield.ai). The API provides broad access to 100+ generative models for image and video creation. No sales gates, admin approval, or special contracts are required to get started. The only minor friction is that useful API usage requires a paid plan due to limited free credits, but this is standard for generative AI services.
rationale.notes: The official MCP server was launched on April 30, 2026, making this particularly well-suited for agent toolkits today.

s1.quote: AI video and image generation platform with 30+ models including Sora 2, Kling 3.0, Veo 3.1. Face swap, virtual try-on, cinema studio, 40+ creative AI tools. 4.5M video generations per day.
s1.title: Higgsfield AI — AI-native creative suite

s2.quote: Higgsfield API delivers comprehensive access to an extensive library of cutting-edge generative media models through a unified integration point. The platform brings together hundreds of specialized models for image, video, voice, and audio generation.
s2.title: Introduction to Higgsfield - Higgsfield API Docs

s3.quote:
The Higgsfield API uses an asynchronous request-response pattern. Base API URL: https://platform.higgsfield.ai
Authorization: Key {your_api_key}:{your_api_key_secret}
s3.title: How to use API - Higgsfield API Docs

s4.quote: Install the Higgsfield Python client using pip: pip install higgsfield-client. Set your API credentials as environment variables. Get your credentials from the Higgsfield Cloud.
s4.title: Client Libraries - Higgsfield API Docs

s5.quote: Authentication is OAuth via your Higgsfield account; no API keys are required for the hosted server.
s5.title: Higgsfield MCP for Claude Code: 60-Second Setup

s6.quote: Developers begin by creating an account on the Higgsfield platform. Visit cloud.higgsfield.ai and sign in using email, Google, Apple, or Microsoft credentials. Once registered, activate a subscription if required—options range from free tiers for testing to paid plans for production use. Next, generate your API key.
s6.title: How to Use Higgsfield API

s7.quote: To get started: 1. Create an account at cloud.higgsfield.ai 2. Generate your API credentials from the dashboard 3. Follow our Quick Start Guide for your first integration
s7.title: FAQ - Higgsfield API Docs

s8.quote: Start with the free tier (daily 5-10 credits) to test if Higgsfield fits your workflow before committing to a paid plan.
s8.title: 2026 Higgsfield API Pricing Full Guide

s9.quote: Webhooks allow you to receive automatic notifications when your generation requests reach a final status. Include the hf_webhook query parameter in your generation request with your webhook endpoint URL.
s9.title: Webhook Integration - Higgsfield API Docs

s10.quote: The Higgsfield API enables you to generate high-quality images from text descriptions using state-of-the-art AI models.
s10.title: Generate Images from Text - Higgsfield API Docs

s11.quote: MCP endpoint URL: https://mcp.higgsfield.ai/mcp. Higgsfield uses MCP (Model Context Protocol), an open standard that gives AI agents access to external tools.
s11.title: Higgsfield MCP | AI Image & Video Generation for Any Agent

s12.quote: Higgsfield shipped its official MCP server on April 30, 2026, exposing 30+ image and video generation models through a single hosted endpoint.
s12.title: Higgsfield MCP: Sora, Veo, Kling from Claude Code

s13.quote: Higgsfield AI MCP Server - A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides access to Higgsfield AI's cinematic-grade image and video generation capabilities. Built with FastMCP.
s13.title: geopopos/higgsfield_ai_mcp

s14.quote: MCP server for Higgsfield AI — generate images and videos with 16+ models (Kling 3, Veo 3, Sora 2, Seedance, Wan, and more)
s14.title: jfikrat/higgsfield-mcp

limitations: Pricing page (higgsfield.ai/pricing) rendered minimal content via fetch due to client-side rendering; pricing info was gathered from third-party sources and official FAQ and documentation
The exact API key authentication header format varies slightly between documentation sources (some show 'Authorization: Key {key}:{secret}', others show 'Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key' header)
Rate limit details are not publicly documented - listed only as 'varies based on your subscription plan'
